This screenshot shows the "Faces" tab of the imganalyzer application. The interface displays a section titled "Face Identities" with statistics indicating 700 clusters and 843 faces. A prominent error message in red states: "Error: RPC call 'faces/run-clustering' timed out after 120000ms." Below, several face clusters are listed, all labeled "Unknown," each with a thumbnail, a count of faces/images (e.g., "8 faces / 8 images"), and an edit icon. The UI is dark-themed, with navigation tabs (Gallery, Batch, Running, Search, Faces) at the top and buttons for "Cluster Faces" and "Refresh" on the right.

This screenshot shows the 'Faces' tab of the imganalyzer software, a tool for analyzing image metadata. A red error banner indicates that the face clustering function timed out after 120,000 milliseconds. Below the error, a list of detected identities is displayed, all currently labeled as 'Unknown.' Each row includes a thumbnail, the label, and statistics for faces and images, such as '6 faces / 6 images,' suggesting the software has identified numerous unclustered faces waiting to be sorted.
